plugins.name: code-optimizer
plugins.description: Pragmatic code optimization plugin that finds duplicates, extracts constants, and suggests concise solutions without over-engineering

plugins.name: github-issues-solver
plugins.description: Analyze, investigate, and fix GitHub issues with AI assistance. Full workflow from issue to PR.

plugins.name: typescript-eslint-fixer
plugins.description: Automatically detect and fix TypeScript type errors and ESLint violations in TypeScript/JavaScript projects

plugins.name: captcha
plugins.description: Integrate third-party CAPTCHA-solving services (2captcha, CapMonster) for authorized automation — reCAPTCHA v2/v3, hCaptcha, Cloudflare Turnstile, and image grid challenges via vision AI

plugins.name: codex-cli
plugins.description: Install, configure, and automate tasks using OpenAI Codex CLI — approval modes, sandbox policies, MCP servers, and CI integration

plugins.name: commafeed-api
plugins.description: Interact with CommaFeed RSS reader via REST API — subscribe, unsubscribe, read, star, tag entries, manage categories, import/export OPML, and manage user settings

plugins.name: gemini-cli
plugins.description: Install, configure, and script with Gemini CLI — headless prompts, MCP servers, custom slash commands, extensions, and CI automation

plugins.name: n8n-api
plugins.description: Interact with n8n automation platform via REST API — manage workflows, executions, credentials, tags, variables, users, and audit logs

plugins.name: notebook-lm
plugins.description: Automate Google NotebookLM — create notebooks, add sources, chat, generate audio/video overviews, quizzes, reports, and mind maps

plugins.name: screen-recording
plugins.description: Autonomous video creation skill — product demos, presentation videos, UI walkthroughs, and narrated screencasts via Pillow, MoviePy, and pyttsx3

plugins.name: test-mobile-app
plugins.description: Automated mobile app testing — analyzes APK/source, generates use cases, runs Appium tests on emulator, and produces QA reports

plugins.name: test-web-ui
plugins.description: Automated web QA — discovers site structure, generates use cases and test plans, runs Playwright tests, and produces HTML reports

plugins.name: text-to-speech
plugins.description: Converts text to speech audio files autonomously using pyttsx3, espeak-ng, Kokoro ONNX, or cloud TTS engines with multilingual support

plugins.name: tm-search
plugins.description: Search, validate, and check availability of US trademarks via USPTO APIs — keyword search, batch validation, and status lookup

plugins.name: wp-rest-api
plugins.description: Build, extend, and debug WordPress REST API endpoints — routes, controllers, schema validation, authentication, and custom fields

plugins.name: youtube-search
plugins.description: Search YouTube for videos, channels, playlists and extract metadata, transcripts, and analytics via multiple API methods

plugins.name: youtube-thumbnail
plugins.description: Generates professional YouTube thumbnails in 11 strategic styles with auto-detection of AI image backends and Pillow compositing

plugins.name: tailwindcss-best-practices
plugins.description: Tailwind CSS v4.x best practices — utility classes, responsive layouts, @theme variables, dark mode, custom utilities with @utility, v3-to-v4 migration, text shadows, masks, and logical properties

plugins.name: vite-best-practices
plugins.description: Vite 8 build tool best practices — configuration, Rolldown/Oxc migration, plugin API with hook filters, SSR, library mode, environment API, and virtual modules

plugins.name: google-merchant-api
plugins.description: Work with Google Merchant Center APIs — Merchant API (v1) and Content API for Shopping (v2.1) for products, inventory, promotions, data sources, reports, and account management

plugins.name: lv-aggregators-api
plugins.description: Generate and manage XML product feeds for Latvian price comparison platforms — Salidzini.lv and KurPirkt.lv integration, feed formats, field mappings, and validation

plugins.name: typescript-expert
plugins.description: TypeScript expertise — type system, generics, utility types, advanced patterns, tsconfig, and TS 5.x features with /typescript-fix command for auto-resolving type errors

plugins.name: next-best-practices
plugins.description: Next.js 16 best practices — App Router, Server/Client Components, data fetching, use cache, cacheTag/cacheLife, Server Actions, useActionState, streaming, metadata/SEO, PPR

plugins.name: nest-best-practices
plugins.description: NestJS v11 framework best practices — modules, controllers, services, DTOs, guards, interceptors, pipes, native JWT auth, Zod validation, Keyv caching, queues, WebSockets, and Suites testing

plugins.name: klix-integration
plugins.description: Integrate Klix (by Citadele) payment gateway — API, card payments, Apple/Google Pay, Baltic bank transfers (PIS), Pay Later, recurring payments, reservations, and eCommerce plugins

plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: Create comprehensive brand guidelines (brand books) — structured interview for colors, typography, logo, voice & tone, then generates a self-contained HTML brand book

plugins.name: paysera-integration
plugins.description: Integrate PaySera Checkout V3 payment gateway — orders, payments, refunds, webhooks, card payments, bank transfers, e-wallets across EU, with TypeScript SDK and NestJS support
